title: 18650 Battery Charger, Universal Fast Dual Charge Battery Charger for 3.7V/3.6V Li-ion Rechargeable Batteries 18650 18500 18490 18350 17670 17500 16340(RCR123) 14500 26650 22650 with USB Cable
features: Intelligent charging: Using high-precision intelligent pulse charging control, providing trickle, constant current and constant voltage safety models, so that you can use it safer and more at ease.
Multiple protections: The charger has built-in circuit protection, providing overcurrent, overcharge, overvoltage, short circuit, and overheat protection.

LED indicator light: Both charging slots have corresponding battery progress indicators. The blue light flashes to indicate that 25%/50%/75% of the energy is charged, and the 100% blue light flashes to indicate that the charge is fully charged.
Convenient design: The REACELL charger has a USB interface, which can be connected to a USB adapter, power bank, notebook, etc., and is small and light, very easy to carry and use.
description: Product Description REACELL 18650 Battery charger for 3.7v/3.6v lithium-ion battery--updated version Why choose REACELL? High security, Multiple protection, Easy to carry After charging is complete, it will automatically switch to trickle charging and charge to 99%, which can extend battery life. Automatically detects and displays non-rechargeable and defective batteries, and protects against overheating, overcharging, overcurrent, overvoltage and short circuits. With a weight of 110 grams and dimensions of 13.6*6.7*3.6 cm, it is very portable and will be your best travel companion anytime, anywhere. Indicator Light Each charging slot has a corresponding indicator light. The blue light flashes to indicate that 25%/50%/75% of the energy has been charged, and the blue light indicates that the charge is fully charged. Smart Charging Using intelligent pulse charge charging control, three modes of trickle current, constant current and constant voltage are automatically identified and switched. Output current when single-cell charging: 1000MA±5%; Output current when double-cell charging: 2000MA±5% Various Charging Methods REACELL rechargeable battery charger has USB interface and can be charged by USB adapter, car charger, power bank and laptop, which is very convenient to carry when traveling. Fully compatible for 18650 rechargeable batteries REACELL rechargeable 18650 battery adopts low self-discharge technology, it can keep 80% of the power after 3 years, it can be recharged up to 1200 times, and it has passed the safety certification, so you can use it with confidence. 18650 Battery Charger and High Capacity 3.7v Rechargeable Battery series 18650 battery charger 4 pack 3.7V button top battery 2 pack 3.7V flat top battery Charger parameters Micro usb input 5V 2A; Output voltage 4.2V Battery parameters 4pcs 3.7V 3000mAh Button Top Rechargeable Battery Battery parameters 2pcs 3.7V 25A Flat Top Rechargeable Battery Widely compatible eg: 18650 18490 18350 17670 17500 16340 14500 20700 21700 rechargeable battery Widely applicable eg: Flashlights, Headlights, Doorbells, Toy Cars, Cameras, Shavers and more. Widely applicable eg: Flashlight, Headlight, Vape, Doorbells, Toy Cars, Cameras, Shavers and more.
